title: Why Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Is Up 8.5% After Launching Its Idira AI Identity Platform - And What's Next
description:
Earlier this month, Palo Alto Networks launched Idira, an AI-driven identity security platform designed to secure human, machine and agentic identities by eliminating standing privileges and unifying privilege access management across the enterprise.
The platform’s focus on securing rapidly proliferating machine and AI identities, which now vastly outnumber human users, highlights how identity has become a primary enterprise attack vector.
